name: create_backup
description:
Takes a backup on a Cloud SQL instance. Always populate the project and instance fields on
the request. The location (region) and description of the backup may also be optionally
provided, in which case the corresponding request fields should also be populated.

parameters.description: Backup runs insert request for MCP.

description.description: Optional. The description of this backup run.

instance.description: Required. Cloud SQL instance ID. This does not include the project ID.

location.description: Optional. Location of the backup run.

project.description: Required. Project ID of the project that contains the instance.
